name: io.github.yehudalevy-collab/polis-protocol
title: Polis Protocol
description: Local-first control plane for coding agents: contracts with owners and evidence, deterministic file reservations, and learning routing — exposed as MCP tools and resources.

packageArguments.description: Run the polis lifecycle as a stdio MCP server (auto-detects the nearest _polis/ workspace; pass --polis-root to override).
